task_completion.description: Set location to Reykjavik, Iceland and configure display settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Stellarium screenshots showing the location set to Reykjavik (or coordinates ~64.14N, 21.94W). The landscape/ground must be hidden, atmosphere enabled (sky has color, not pure black unless during totality), and constellation lines must be visible.

task_completion.description: Observe and capture the four eclipse contact points (C1, C2, C3, C4) from Reykjavik.
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least four distinct Stellarium screenshots showing the Sun at different stages of the eclipse on August 12, 2026: C1 (partial begins), C2 (totality begins), C3 (totality ends), and C4 (partial ends).

task_completion.description: Zoom out during totality to identify bright planets or stars.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A wide-field Stellarium screenshot taken during totality (Sun completely obscured, sky darkened) showing other celestial bodies (planets/stars) with constellation lines turned ON.

task_completion.description: Change location to Rome, Italy at mid-eclipse time and document the appearance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Stellarium screenshot showing the location set to Rome, Italy (or coordinates ~41.90N, 12.50E) on August 12, 2026, displaying only a partial solar eclipse.

A text editor or terminal output showing the contents of 'eclipse_contact_times.txt'. The file must include: all four contact UTC times with Sun altitude/azimuth, totality duration (approx 80 seconds), objects visible during totality, and the Rome control observation result.

integrity.description: The agent used the Stellarium application to perform the observations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual Stellarium GUI with the correct dates, times, and locations, rather than just terminal outputs or web browser searches.

integrity.description: The agent created and saved the required text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final report is visible in a text editor (like gedit/nano) or verified via a terminal command (like cat or ls) targeting ~/Desktop/eclipse_contact_times.txt.

integrity.description: The agent took the required minimum number of screenshots at the correct moments.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of at least 6 distinct screenshots (4 contacts, 1 wide-field totality, 1 Rome control) showing different timestamps and visual states, proving the agent systematically advanced time.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Eclipse Date: 2026-08-12. Primary Location: Reykjavik, Iceland (approx 64.14N, 21.94W). Control Location: Rome, Italy (approx 41.90N, 12.50E). Display settings: Atmosphere ON, Landscape OFF, Constellation lines ON. Totality duration in Reykjavik is approximately 80 seconds. Mid-eclipse Sun altitude is ~20-25 degrees. The Rome control observation should show only a partial eclipse. The final report must be at ~/Desktop/eclipse_contact_times.txt and include contact times, alt/az, totality duration, visible objects, and the Rome result. At least 6 screenshots are expected (4 contacts, 1 wide-field totality, 1 Rome control).
